description: You are a game artist preparing assets for a mobile game. Create a 6-column spritesheet with a transparent background at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/spritesheet.png' using the animation scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The animation must be rendered as a sequence of 256x256 transparent PNG frames to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/spritesheet_frames/' and assembled into the final sprite sheet grid.
